title: LIVE: Rubio says Trump ‘not going to make a bad deal’ with Iran
full_text:
Live updatesLive updates,
LIVE: Rubio says Trump ‘not going to make a bad deal’ with Iran
US president says any potential agreement with Tehran will be ‘good and proper’ as mediation efforts continue.
Published On 24 May 2026
- US Secretary of State Marco Rubio says a “pretty solid” proposal is on the table amid continuing efforts to reach an agreement with Iran, while insisting that President Donald Trump is “not going to make a bad deal”.
- Trump has said he instructed his team not to rush into any agreement as Japan’s stock market surges to record high on hopes of an end to US-Israel war on Iran.
